# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URLS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Comma separated URLs of build artifacts to download')
        string(name: 'PRODUCTION_SERVERS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Comma separated production server addresses')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_USER', defaultValue: 'deploy', description: 'User to deploy with')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_PATH', defaultValue: '/opt/app', description: 'Deployment path on production servers')
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (!params.ARTIFACT_URLS) {
                        error "ARTIFACT_URLS parameter is required"
                    }
                    if (!params.PRODUCTION_SERVERS) {
                        error "PRODUCTION_SERVERS parameter is required"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Download Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactUrls = params.ARTIFACT_URLS.split(',')
                    def artifactFiles = []
                    
                    for (def url : artifactUrls) {
                        def fileName = url.tokenize('/')[-1]
                        sh "curl -L -o ${fileName} ${url}"
                        artifactFiles << fileName
                    }
                    
                    env.ARTIFACT_FILES = artifactFiles.join(',')
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = params.PRODUCTION_SERVERS.split(',')
                    def artifactFiles = env.ARTIFACT_FILES.split(',')
                    
                    for (def server : servers) {
                        echo "Deploying to ${server}"
                        
                        for (def file : artifactFiles) {
                            sh """
                                ssh ${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server} "mkdir -p ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}"
                                scp ${file} ${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server}:${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/
                            """
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Cleanup') {
            steps {
                sh 'rm -f *.jar *.zip *.tar.gz'
            }
        }
    }
}
